meaning: n.十字,交叉,十字架,十字形物adj.交叉的,相反的,乖戾的v.使交叉,横过,勾划,错过,反对,杂交
examples: The roads cross just outside the town.
I drove cross-country in his van.
Other tricks used to win included not running the right number of laps in cross-country races.
But it no longer owns Southern Cross, having floated it on the stock market in 2006.
